ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the football team */,
  "league_position" INTEGER /* Current position of the team in the league standings */,
  "team_manager" TEXT /* Name of the team manager */,
  "team_captain" TEXT /* Name of the team captain */,
  "home_stadium" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team playing the match */,
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the opponent */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "match_time" TEXT /* Time the match was played */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Location where the match was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators attending the match */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "match_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the match (win, loss, draw) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_opponent_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team's standing record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Total matches played by the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Total wins by the team */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Total draws by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Total losses by the team */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded by the team */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the team */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Goal difference (goals for - goals against) */,
  "points_per_match" TEXT /* Average points earned per match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, coach, analyst) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's statistics record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Total matches played by the player */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists made by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Total yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Total red cards received by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player (e.g., goalkeeper, defender, midfielder, forward) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the coach */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the coach */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach manages */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match where the event occurred */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team involved in the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., goal, yellow card, red card, substitution) */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time when the event occurred */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
